name: Buzzing Bites

spell.name: Buzzing Bites
spell.critical_failure: The target takes double damage and is sickened 1 by the crawling insects. The sickened value can’t be reduced below 1 while the spell is active.

text: You evoke buzzing and crawling insects to climb onto a foe’s body and bite, dealing 1d4 piercing damage and potentially sickening the foe, depending on its Fortitude save. Once this spell ends, the target becomes temporarily immune for 1 minute.
